response.justification: While Bogdan demonstrates exceptional technical depth (20+ years development, Staff-level roles at Google/Meta) and strong hands-on engineering skills, he lacks the critical people management experience required for this mid-to-senior management role. The position explicitly requires 2 years in people management or team leadership; the resume shows zero evidence of managing direct reports, conducting performance reviews, or leading teams. His background is purely individual contributor and technical leader roles. For a full-time people-leadership position, this is a disqualifying gap that cannot be offset by technical excellence alone.
strengths: Exceptional technical breadth: 20+ years across compilers, embedded systems, web, mobile, and infrastructure with Staff-level roles at major tech companies
Demonstrable commitment to engineering quality and knowledge sharing: founded testing libraries (fluent-asserts), led workshops on TDD/Selenium, organized code katas
Hands-on system design expertise: optimized high-scale systems at Meta (millions of mails), data integration handling millions of requests/second at Dunnhumby
concerns: No people management experience: resume shows zero evidence of managing direct reports, conducting one-on-ones, or developing team members—critical for a full-time people-leadership role
Limited developer tools and build systems depth: some CI/CD setup and testing libraries, but no production compiler, release automation, or build infrastructure experience at scale
Lacks organizational leadership credentials: no evidence of leading organizational change, setting team priorities aligned to broader goals, or strategic roadmap ownership at multiple levels

key_factors.factor: Developer tools and build systems domain experience
